assertions.title: Generated runtime text and asset surfaces are renamed

steps.expected: The minimal related generated text route returns 200 and uses renamed `Papierklammer` wording only.
steps.observed: Route returned `HTTP/1.1 200 OK`; the heading was `# Papierklammer Agent Configuration Index`, and a token scan found no `paperclip` or `Paperclip` matches.

steps.expected: The previously failing OpenClaw gateway generated text route returns 200 and does not emit legacy `paperclip`/`Paperclip` branding.
steps.observed: Route returned `HTTP/1.1 200 OK`; the body used renamed tokens such as `Papierklammer`, `papierklammerApiUrl`, `papierklammer.workspace`, `papierklammer.workspaces`, and `papierklammer.workspaceRuntime`, and a scan found no `paperclip` or `Paperclip` matches.

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Scanned the captured route bodies for `paperclip` and `Paperclip`; no matches remained. The OpenClaw route now exposes the renamed `papierklammer*` fields only.

summary: Retested VAL-RUNTIME-006 via curl. Both the index route and `/llms/agent-configuration/openclaw_gateway.txt` returned 200, and the previously failing OpenClaw generated text no longer exposes legacy `paperclip`/`Paperclip` branding.
